text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Recently, a new game called "Horsegirl Riddles" has
become all the rage among the students at the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It involves solving a series of riddles left around
the school, and Sakura Bakushin O decided to
take on the challenge after a classmate
recommended she try.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Aaagh! I haven't the faintest idea!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Being a model student, I should be leading the
charge on solving this mystery! But I'm getting
nowhere!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! Although I'd be extremely grateful, it
wouldn't set a good example, would it?
choice_data_list:
You could inspire others through your
willingness to cooperate with your trainer.

You could inspire others through your
willingness to cooperate with your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there's no problem then! Time to put my class
representative prowess to the test!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh! It seems I can "receive a hint from
Nakayama"?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Nakayama... Nakayama... Nakayama must be...
choice_data_list:
Perhaps something to do with Nakayama
Racecourse?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I see! There's a popular girl called Nakayama here
at the academy.
choice_data_list: Why don't you ask her for the hint directly?
Why don't you ask her for the hint directly?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Our first hurdle on the path to our goal! With my
guts and fighting spirit, I'll track her down!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I found you, Nakayama! Okay! Let me have the
third Horsegirl Riddle hint!
choice_data_list:
She won't understand what you're talking about
if that's all you say...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
No, I understand. You mean the "receive a hint
from Nakayama," message right? I am actually the
Nakayama the message talks about.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: ...But I'm not giving it to you that easily.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Why?!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
You'll have to battle me for the hint. If you win,
I'll tell you what you want to know.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Let me see... In your case, how about being
banned from your class representative duties for
a day?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'll do it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You don't need to worry! My class representative
prowess will definitely help me seize victory!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Nice. Those are the eyes of someone willing to
bet it all.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I'll let you decide the details. Let's make it a
battle to remember!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Wait... sorry. Could you say what you just said
again?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Sure! My class representative prowess will
definitely help me seize victory!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Class... representative prowess?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! I always conduct myself with the mindset
and behavior befitting a class representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Nakayama! Let's have a competition to decide
who has what it takes to be called class
representative!
choice_data_list: You can refuse, Nakayama, it's okay.
You can refuse, Nakayama, it's okay.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
No, I would never back down from someone with
the determination to put everything on the line.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Besides, the more overwhelmingly unfavorable
the odds, the more fired up I get!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so begins the competition for the title of
ultimate class representative.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two battle it out to see which one of them
can talk and behave the most like a class
representative in a variety of situations...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O dominates the early rounds,
but Nakayama Festa shows great tenacity,
resulting in a fierce battle that stays tense till the
very end.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Victory is mine!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heh, it's my loss... Your strength as a class
representative runs deep.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
As I promised, the hint is yours. Keep up the good
work, Class Representative!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to the Nakayama Festa's hint, Bakushin O
was finally able to solve all the Horsegirl Riddles.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Safe from being banned from her class
representative duties, she remains in a cheerful
mood.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I see! Being a Tracen student is all about racing!
And when it comes to racing, the racecourse is
the place to be!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Heh heh, an excellent deduction!
choice_data_list: It's outside the school grounds though...
It's outside the school grounds though...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
On the contrary! If you see the racecourse as
another place of learning, it could be considered
a part of the school!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm heading over to the Nakayama Racecourse
this weekend! The hint must be over there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although I'm not so sure about her reasoning, it
wouldn't be a bad idea to check out the
Nakayama Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In addition to solving the riddle, it could be a
good chance to learn about the racecourse itself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, that weekend...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Heh heh heh! Here it is! Nakayama Racecourse!
choice_data_list:
Since we're here, why don't we take a look
around?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Okay! We'll do that while looking into the Horsegirl
Riddle!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Look! Check out the final stretch before the finish
line!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That hill is the final obstacle. If I Bakushin up it
and reach the finish line in first place...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I bet it would feel amazing!
choice_data_list:
That's why you need to work on maintaining
your energy levels.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: But of course! I'll work even harder!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'll ensure that the name Sakura Bakushin O decks
the hallowed halls of Nakayama Racecourse for
generations to come!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: But I won't be able to succeed like this!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I have to head back to the academy and get
training!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Blasting toward a glorious future! Bakushiiin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems my words fall on deaf ears as I watch
Sakura Bakushin O disappear from view.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: BAKU-SHIN! BA-KU-SHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hmm, let's finish here today.

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text: Oh! Class Representative! Nice work today!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Thanks! You guys too!

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text:
Didn't you say you were off to Nakayama
Racecourse? Did you give up?

text_block_list.name: Classmate C
text_block_list.text:
Well, Nakayama Racecourse isn't the Nakayama
from the Horsegirl Riddle anyway, so...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Horsegirl Riddle... "Nakayama"?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: OHHH! It totally slipped my mind!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, there wasn't enough time for Sakura
Bakushin O to completely solve the Horsegirl Riddles.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the information she gained at Nakayama
Racecourse helped her grow a little.
